{{Quote|Strike quickly!|Jor Drakas|audio=Strikequicklyjor.flac|<ref name="SWGB: CC" />}}
'''Jor Drakas''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] who participated in two battles against the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] circa [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Upon Drakas' and Tann's [[Battle of Kaer Orbital Platform|first encounter]] at the [[Kaer Orbital Platform]], in which Drakas unsuccessfully tried to prevent Tann from rebuilding the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], Tann retreated after completing her mission. However, during the [[Assault on Sarapin|battle]] for natural energy reserves on the Republic [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]], Tann [[Death/Legends|killed]] Drakas.

==Biography==
===Kaer Orbital Platform===
{{Quote|Victory will be ours!|Jor Drakas|<ref name="SWGB: CC" />}}
[[File:Jor_Drakas_profile.jpg|thumb|left|Jedi Knight Jor Drakas]]
Jor Drakas, a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Shortly after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]<ref name="SWGB: CC" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NECGeonosis">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] sent [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]]—a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] serving the Confederacy—to the abandoned [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] base at the [[Kaer Orbital Platform]]. There, Tann was assigned to rebuild the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] in secret from the Republic.<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

However, Tann's operation was discovered, and Drakas soon [[Battle of Kaer Orbital Platform|led]] a task force of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against Tann. After their [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] landed on the platform, Drakas' [[Troop/Legends|troops]] established a base of operations and began making raids on Tann's territory. After several small skirmishes, Tann chose to retreat, but not before finishing the construction of a considerable amount of [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

===Sarapin===
{{Quote|Count Dooku, Mt. Corvast is in ruins and the energy stores are ours! I've also dispatched the pathetic Jedi Knight, Jor Drakas.|Sev'rance Tann reports to Count Dooku following her victory on Sarapin|<ref name="SWGB: CC" />}}
[[File:Drakas.png|thumb|right|200px|Sev'rance Tann and Jor Drakas dueled on Sarapin.]]
In 21.95 BBY, one month after the Battle of Geonosis,<ref name="NEC" /> Drakas was assigned to guard the Republic energy [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. His<ref name="CSWE" /> presence was after the Republic learned that the Separatists would attempt to secure the planet's natural energy reserves. On Sarapin, Drakas occupied the [[Mount Corvast Citadel|Citadel]] located on [[Mount Corvast]], the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. It was not long before Tann's forces approached Sarapin, [[Battle of Asteroid 426|destroyed]] its [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] defenses, and landed on the planet.<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

Using the stolen Republic [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] technology—a ground vehicle equipped with a powerful [[Laser/Legends|laser]]—Tann [[Assault on Sarapin|overwhelmed]] Mount Corvast and destroyed the Citadel. Drakas survived its destruction and attacked the Separatist forces with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="SWGB: CC" /> Tann engaged the Jedi Knight in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]], where she [[Death/Legends|killed]] Drakas<ref name="CSWE" /> and successfully captured Sarapin, immediately reporting her victory and Drakas' death to Count Dooku. However, Sarapin was soon [[Recapture of Sarapin|recaptured]], thanks to the efforts of the Jedi Knight [[Echuu Shen-Jon]], who went on to [[Battle of Krant|kill]] Tann on the planet [[Krant]].<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|What are my orders?|Jor Drakas|<ref name="SWGB: CC" />}}
Jor Drakas had [[Color/Legends|pink]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and white skin. In her report to Count Dooku, Sev'rance Tann held little respect for Drakas, calling him "pathetic."<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

==Equipment==
Jor Drakas possessed a yellow-bladed lightsaber and wore brown [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]].<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jor Drakas first appeared in the [[2002]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'', the expansion pack for the real-time strategy game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The character was voiced by [[Nick Jameson]], and his character model and profile image are identical to that of the character [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], who also appears in the game.<ref name="SWGB: CC" />

In the second level of the Confederacy campaign, titled "Building the Army," which involves the events on the Kaer Orbital Platform, Drakas' name only appears representing the leader of the Republic faction. The character makes a full appearance in the campaign's seventh and final level, "Sarapin's Fury," where he emerges from Mount Corvast Citadel and attacks the player's army. While any unit can kill Drakas in the game,<ref name="SWGB: CC" /> his entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], stated that Tann personally killed the Jedi Knight.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
